notes: Initialized from discovery brief 2026-05-30. Extracted from walkforward-tuning-loop at its /kiro-validate-design (operator decision): a point-in-time counterfactual backtest engine that drives the LANDED reactive + survival pure cores + broker paper-fill sim over Massive historical data, returning a per-period outcome record the walkforward CPCV gate scores. Clean seam: harness backtests ONE config over ONE window; walkforward owns CPCV partitioning + survival-net metric + DSR/PBO gate. Data feasibility CONFIRMED by /deep-research (Task wfho5d8um): Massive API (Polygon rebrand) serves 1-sec bars, tick trades, NBBO quotes, grouped daily, split-unadjusted, delisted coverage to 2003-09-10 on the Advanced/Business tier. Dependencies: reactive-signal-model (decision core, DESIGNED), survival-gate (admit/assess, DESIGNED), broker-cfd-adapter (paper.py, LANDED), decision-trace-telemetry (realized history + ledger, mig 048 landed). Likely NO new migration (read-only). Constraints to carry into requirements: (1) Advanced/Business tier procurement; (2) Massive bars never dividend-adjusted -> credit dividends separately for total-return P&L; (3) no look-ahead / point-in-time fetch + 50k-row pagination cap; (4) champion-reproduction fidelity precondition; (5) leaf/inner-ring testable with stub cores; (6) LIVE-PROBE before impl: SPY/S&P500 symbol coverage, exact rate limits, reference-endpoint (splits/dividends/tickers/market-holidays) entitlement, delisted OHLC depth. Downstream consumer walkforward-tuning-loop is gated on this reaching design (consumed-contract concreteness). | DESIGN 2026-05-30 (-y): fan-out discovery (4 agents). Two-layer engine — daily decisions (driven reactive cores, LANDED) + intraday account path (paper sim + survival admit/assess, DESIGNED-stub). Module src/reactive/replay/ (compute leaf, not src/skills). BUILD Massive historical REST client (gate_client pattern); reuse landed cores. FIDELITY baseline = decision_process_trace fill rows ONLY (ledger is slow-layer sector-excess, NOT reactive P&L — advisor catch); champion P&L via decision-linked per-symbol per-§16.1-day entry/exit pairing (no position_id). DataPort injected (R9.2 isolation + R2.2 on-demand). No DB table (read-only).
